definition: The 50% midpoint of any price inefficiency — FVG, opening gap (NWOG/NDOG), liquidity void, or breaker block. CE is the mathematical equilibrium of the imbalance where institutional orders cluster most densely. It is the precision entry point within any ICT zone.
depends_on: fair_value_gaps (CE of FVG = 50% of the gap)
opening_gaps (CE of NWOG/NDOG = highest probability weekly/daily level)
feeds_into: optimal_trade_entry (CE refines OTE — enter at CE within OTE zone)
entry_models (CE provides sub-pip precision for limit orders)
draw_on_liquidity (CE of unfilled gap = precision DOL target)

why_ce_works.institutional_logic: Large orders can't fill at a single price — they need range. CE is where the order book is thickest within the imbalance.
why_ce_works.statistical_basis: Price reacts at CE ~65-70% of the time when approaching an unfilled inefficiency
why_ce_works.market_maker_perspective: Market makers use CE to balance their book — it's the fair price within the imbalance

tier_1_highest.description: 50% of New Week Opening Gap — strongest weekly level
tier_1_highest.hold_time: Level remains valid all week until filled

tier_2_high.hold_time: Valid until FVG is fully filled

tier_3_medium.hold_time: Valid for the current trading day

as_entry.method: Place limit order at CE of the FVG/gap in the direction of bias
as_entry.sl: Beyond the far edge of the FVG/gap (not CE — the full zone boundary)
as_entry.advantage: Tighter SL than entering at zone edge = better R:R

as_target.method: Use CE of unfilled gaps/voids as TP targets
as_target.logic: Price fills to CE ~70% of the time even when it doesn't fill the full gap

as_bias_filter.method: Price above NWOG CE = bullish week. Below = bearish week.
as_bias_filter.logic: CE acts as the equilibrium — being on one side implies directional pressure to rebalance

stacking_ce.definition: When CE of multiple zones aligns at the same price level
stacking_ce.example: NWOG CE at 4527 + HTF FVG CE at 4528 + OB midpoint at 4526 = triple-stacked CE
stacking_ce.significance: Stacked CE = highest confluence entry. Grade A+ guaranteed if other layers align.
stacking_ce.score_bonus: +8 to ICT score for double-stacked CE, +12 for triple-stacked

bridge_integration.auto_calculation: For every detected FVG, compute CE = (high + low) / 2 and store as entry candidate
bridge_integration.entry_precision: When placing limit orders, prefer CE over zone edge for tighter SL
bridge_integration.score_impact: Entry at CE of active zone = +3 to ICT score. Stacked CE = +8.
bridge_integration.level_type: Add CE levels to session_levels alongside PDH/PDL/PWH/PWL
